modtabs.midnightconfig.title: Mod Tabs Settings
modtabs.midnightconfig.stickyInventoryTa: Keep the inventory tab always visible as the first tab on all pages
modtabs.midnightconfig.inventoryTabOrder: Override order for Inventory Tab (0 = default alphabetical order, 1+ = custom order)
